meaning: n.踏,步态,梯级,踏板,轮胎面,交尾,鞋底vi.踏,行走,踩碎,践踏,交尾vt.踩,踏,践踏,跳
examples: I heard his heavy tread on the stairs.
The fat, broad tyres had a good depth of tread.
Notice how the tread on this tyre has worn down.
"potato chip conditions" describe a dry, pine-needle carpet that crunches when you tread on it.
Slader has chosen to veer away from the traditional non-profit course education start-ups tread.
